item.title: IEA launches 'energy crisis' summary of responses to Middle East war
item.description: The new online tool tracks government measures to conserve energy and give consumers price relief

item.title: US LNG terminal delayed by contractor bankruptcy reaches first production
item.description: Golden Pass set to begin exports later this quarter

item.title: Petrobras wins licence for three-well campaign in Brazil’s equatorial margin
item.description: Drilling of Mae de Ouro exploration well is earmarked for the second half of 2026

item.title: Chevron and QatarEnergy acquire stakes in Uruguay offshore blocks
item.description: All offshore acreage in South American nation is currently contracted

item.title: Capricorn stock up as Egypt parliament ratifies key licence deal
item.description: Approval paves way for petroleum minister to sign favourable concession deal

item.title: Mopane resource estimate soars to 1.4 billion barrels of oil equivalent
item.description: Galp Energia reports 57% increase in contingent resources of big Namibia discovery

item.title: TotalEnergies completes merger of UK North Sea business
item.description: French energy giant has combined with Repsol-HitecVision vehicle

item.title: Russia hits Ukraine gas fields in response to Baltic oil terminal fires
item.description: Kyiv and Moscow step on efforts to undermine energy supplies as frontline enters stalemate

item.title: Critical Angola drilling campaign to start in 'coming days'
item.description: Block partners sign deal to use jack-up under contract to operator Sonangol

item.title: UK regulator calls for more emissions data for Rosebank and Jackdaw fields
item.description: Scope 3 emissions data was submitted for the Rosebank and Jackdaw fields last year

item.title: UK-listed player's merger plans face challenge from beneficial shareholder
item.description: Falcon Oil & Gas and Tamboran Resources trying to complete merger

item.title: Woodside resumes loading at Australian LNG project
item.description: Operator working to restore normal production following ex-Tropical Cyclone Narelle

item.title: Santos steps up for Australia’s energy security amid Middle East War
item.description: Operator accelerating crude deliveries to domestic refineries

item.title: Medco launches EPC and rig tenders for Indonesian projects
item.description: Operator accelerating development of its Sakakemang asset via an early production scheme

item.title: Prime boosts Malampaya with back-to-back gas discoveries
item.description: Exploiting new volumes can reduce Philippines' dependence on more costly imported LNG

item.title: Two more Australian LNG projects suffer outages as cyclone rages
item.description: Chevron's Wheatstone and Gorgon projects among this week's casualties

item.title: US senator slams TotalEnergies' $1 billion shift from wind to oil and gas
item.description: Senator John Hickenlooper of Colorado said TotalEnergies' about-face breaks public trust

item.title: Trump positioning military to reopen Strait of Hormuz, says US senator
item.description: Senator Dave McCormick says US military may be positioning to reopen critical energy trade route

item.title: Attacks on Russia-linked ships force Greece to brace for major oil spill
item.description: Minister concerned about latest acts of sabotage in Mediterranean and Black Sea

item.title: Sinopec subsidiaries land construction contracts in Kazakhstan
item.description: Kazakhstan rushes to award contracts as it presses for higher utilisation of associated gas at its large oil developments

item.title: NOV invests $200 million to double pipe manufacturing capacity in Brazil
item.description: Company also working on new generation of risers for high-CO2 applications in the pre-salt

item.title: Trump wants US energy to hit accelerator, producers prefer cruise control
item.description: Oil and gas producers at CERAWeek made it clear: there’s little else they can do to quickly steer more supplies to import-dependent Asia

item.title: Shell and Orsted defeat lawsuit from Musk’s X
item.description: Social media platform owned by world’s richest man and Trump ally sued renewables developers and multiple other companies for allegedly conspiring to boycott advertising on X

item.title: UK-listed player secures extension for 1.5 Tcf gas prospect
item.description: Europa OIl & Gas aims to use extension for further technical studies and to secure partner to advance development

item.title: Middle East war will intensify push for energy security and diversification: Baker Hughes CEO
item.description: Iran war disruptions will lead to ‘doubling down’ on supply security priorities, with diversification and gas‑led resilience key outcomes, Lorenzo Simonelli tells Upstream

item.title: Edison drops arbitration case against Venture Global
item.description: Two sides reach settlement agreement that calls for additional LNG cargoes to Italian utility

item.title: Aussie juniors make headway in Indonesia
item.description: Triangle Energy and Bass Oil eye expansion in Southeast Asian country

item.title: It’s official: Key contract for Indonesia gas project not awarded!
item.description: Conrad Asia Energy puts the record straight on Mako prize

item.title: It’s official: Key contract for Indonesia gas project not awarded
item.description: Conrad Asia Energy puts the record straight on Mako prize

item.title: Another Australian LNG facility taken out of action
item.description: Woodside Energy shuts in NWS project in wake of Cyclone Narelle
